# UNC Development

> Solo full-stack engineering studio run by Miki Jokovic, based in Addison, IL (Chicago metro). Specialises in production-ready web and mobile applications — from zero-to-one MVP builds through to complex multi-service platforms.

## About

Miki Jokovic is a solo full-stack engineer with over 10 years of experience shipping production software. Recent projects include OMENORA (iOS/web), Reachify Labs, and a 54-microservice fleet management platform. Works with an AI-augmented workflow (Claude, Cursor, Windsurf).

## Services

- **MVP Build** — Full product from idea to deployed app.
- **Web App Development** — Custom SaaS, dashboards, and web platforms.
- **Mobile App Development** — iOS and Android native and cross-platform apps.
- **Monthly Retainer** — Ongoing development partner for growing products.
- **Codebase Audit & Roadmap** — Technical review and prioritised action plan.
- **AI Integration Sprint** — Add AI capabilities to existing products.

## Contact

- Email: developmentteam@uncdevelopment.com
- Location: Addison, IL — Chicago metro. Remote-first. Clients globally.
- Availability: Booking new projects starting June 2026.
- Response time: Under 4 hours, Mon–Fri 9am–6pm CT.

## Links

- Website: https://uncdevelopment.com/
